title: Top-N users by comment count
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.top_n_commenters/1` that takes an integer `n` and returns the top-N users by comment count. Return a list of maps `%{id, name, comment_count}`. Use a left join on comments (so users with 0 comments are considered), group by user id+name, order by `count desc`, and limit to `^n`. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Multi-clause with join + aggregate + ordered limit + pinned variable. Several things to get right at once.
